zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice De Hastings於1340年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾藍德瓦德時，她的父親John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings53歲，母親Juliana de Leybourne37歲。她於1336年與Thomas Cotton在英國坎布利其爾藍德瓦德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1400年在英國坎布利其爾藍德瓦德享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice De Hastings于1340年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾藍德瓦德时，她的父亲John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings53岁，母亲Juliana de Leybourne37岁。她于1336年与Thomas Cotton在英国坎布利其爾藍德瓦德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1400年在英国坎布利其爾藍德瓦德享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice De Hastings was born in 1340, in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, was 53 and her mother, Juliana de Leybourne, was 37. She married Thomas Cotton in 1336, in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1400, in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice De Hastings est née en 1340, à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Leybourne, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Cotton en 1336, à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice De Hastings 1340 in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings 53 und ihre Mutter Juliana de Leybourne 37. Sie hat 1336 in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England Thomas Cotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1400 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De Hastings è nata il nel 1340 nel Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Juliana de Leybourne, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Cotton nel 1336, nel Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1400, nel Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice De Hastingsが1340年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアランドワドで生まれた時，父John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastingsは53歳，母Juliana de Leybourneは37歳であった。1336年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアランドワドでThomas Cottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1400年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアランドワドで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice De Hastings(이)가 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana de Leybourne(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1336년 영국 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에서 Thomas Cotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De Hastings nasceu em 1340, em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Leybourne, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Cotton em 1336, em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1400, em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice De Hastings родилась в 1340 г. в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Leybourne, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Cotton в 1336 г. в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1400 г. в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice De Hastings nació en 1340, en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Juliana de Leybourne, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Thomas Cotton en 1336, en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1400, en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
